creator: glarkin@FreeBSD.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Hello Gea-Suan,

I had to add a MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR directive to the sysutils/scribeserver
Makefile so the distfile could be fetched successfully.

After that, I build the application in a tinderbox with FreeBSD 7.2.
The build failed with an mtree error.  Please view the following log
file to see the list of files that should be added to pkg-plist:

http://www.sourcehosting.net/freebsd/scribeserver-2.01.log

Please submit an updated pkg-plist to the PR, and I will try the build
again.

Thank you,
Greg
- --
Greg Larkin

http://www.FreeBSD.org/           - The Power To Serve
http://www.sourcehosting.net/     - Ready. Set. Code.
http://twitter.com/sourcehosting/ - Follow me, follow you
